visual_description: A close‑up shows a man with short dark hair and a serious expression seated in the driver’s seat of a car, while another person is partially visible and out of focus behind him. The camera then cuts to an exterior night view of a black classic sedan with silver‑rimmed wheels parked on a city street, illuminated by shop signs and streetlights. The car remains stationary as the scene shows surrounding storefronts and a traffic sign.
